channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Protests in Yemen against US-Israeli attacks as Houthis warn of action
item.description: Protesters in Yemen took to the streets to voice support for Iran, Palestine, and Lebanon amid US and Israeli attacks.

item.title: Russian strikes on Ukraine kill 4 as deal to end war dims
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio voices openness to diverting weapons to Kyiv to support the US attack on Iran.

item.title: The war on Iran faces a MAGA backlash
item.description: A deep split in the MAGA movement threatens Trump’s Iran war.

item.title: Philippine transport strikers say Marcos Jr failing to control oil prices
item.description: Transport workers call on Philippines President Marcos Jr to focus on price caps and reining in oil companies.

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 29 of attacks?
item.description: Tensions continue to rise with Iran warning a 'heavy price' will be paid after Israeli air attacks.

item.title: Trump claims Iran wants to ‘make a deal’
item.description: US President Donald Trump claimed Tehran is seeking a deal and praised the strength of the US military.

item.title: Yemen’s Houthis launch missile attack on Israel as war with Iran intensifies
item.description: Rebels say they fired a barrage of ballistic missiles targeting 'sensitive Israeli military sites' in southern Israel.

item.title: Israel’s unending attacks in Lebanon push country’s population to the brink
item.description: Four weeks into the US-Israeli war on Iran, many in Lebanon are suffering under yet another Israeli aggression.

item.title: Uproar in Bahrain after detainee dies in police custody
item.description: Rights groups in Bahrain say a 32-year-old man, arrested for opposing the war on Iran, was killed in police custody.

item.title: How the US-Israel war on Iran unfolded in its first four weeks
item.description: Al Jazeera revisits major military, political and economic developments that took place in first month of the conflict.
